name: pria-session-context
description: Pria agentic-VM in-VM integration: loads control-plane session context (by file, keyed by session_id), tags audit records with Account/Instance/User/session IDs, gates tool calls via before_tool_call, forwards a multi-sink audit stream to Pria's ingest endpoint, and (protocol v2) forwards raw LLM token usage from on_usage to Pria via the guest-agent signing proxy.

config.description: Pria audit ingest endpoint. Overridden by context.ingest_url if present.
Bearer token for the ingest endpoint.
Base URL of the Pria credential broker (issue/revoke).
Relative path under SYNAPS_BASE_DIR for the local JSONL audit spool.
Guest-agent local usage-proxy endpoint (it signs + forwards to Pria /internal/agentic-vm/usage). Overridden by context.usage_url if present. Falls back to ingest_url when unset.
Bearer token for the guest-agent local usage proxy. Falls back to ingest_token when unset.
